1.title: Acceptance of Terms
1.content: By downloading, installing, or using Skora ("the App"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the App.

2.title: Description of Service
2.intro: Skora is a board game scorekeeper application that provides:
list: Score tracking and game management
Player profile management with photos
Game history and statistics
Local multiplayer connectivity via peer-to-peer networking
iCloud synchronization (optional)
Premium features via in-app purchase

3.title: User Accounts
3.content: Skora does not require user account creation. All data is stored locally on your device and optionally synced via your personal iCloud account.

4.1.title: In-App Purchase
4.1.intro: Premium features are available through a one-time in-app purchase. Premium features include:
list: Increased player limit (up to 12 players)
Unlimited game history
Additional app themes and icons

4.2.title: Refunds
4.2.content: All purchases are processed through the Apple App Store and are subject to Apple's refund policies. We do not process refunds directly.

4.3.title: No Recurring Charges
4.3.content: The Premium upgrade is a one-time purchase with no subscription or recurring fees.

5.title: User Conduct
5.intro: You agree to use the App only for lawful purposes. You will not:
list: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the App
Use the App to transmit harmful code or malicious content
Attempt to interfere with the App's operation
Use the App in violation of any applicable laws

6.1.title: Local Connectivity
6.1.content: Multiplayer features use Apple's MultipeerConnectivity framework for local peer-to-peer connections. No data is transmitted over the internet during multiplayer sessions.

6.2.title: User Responsibility
6.2.content: You are responsible for the players you invite to multiplayer games. We are not liable for any data shared during local multiplayer sessions.

7.1.title: iCloud
7.1.content: If you enable iCloud sync, your data is stored in your personal iCloud account subject to Apple's terms and privacy policies.

8.1.title: Ownership
8.1.content: The App, including all content, features, and functionality, is owned by the developer and protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

8.2.title: User Content
8.2.content: You retain ownership of all photos and data you add to the App. By using the App, you grant us a non-exclusive license to store and display your content within the App for functionality purposes.

9.title: Data Backup
9.content: You are responsible for backing up your data. We recommend enabling iCloud sync to prevent data loss. We are not liable for any data loss resulting from device failure, App deletion, or other circumstances.

10.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
10.content: THE APP IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.

11.title: Limitation of Liability
11.content: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, WE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS OR REVENUES, WHETHER INCURRED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, OR ANY LOSS OF DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES.

12.title: Changes to Terms
12.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify users of material changes through the App or App Store updates. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

13.title: Termination
13.content: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend access to the App immediately, without prior notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties, or for any other reason.

14.title: Governing Law
14.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of your jurisdiction, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

15.title: Contact
15.content: For questions about these Terms, please contact: avdev2024@gmail.com

1.title: Introduction
1.content: This Privacy Policy explains how Skora ("we," "us," or "the App") collects, uses, and protects your information. We are committed to protecting your privacy and being transparent about our data practices.

2.1.title: Information You Provide
list: Player Names: Names you enter for player profiles
Photos: Images you add from your camera or photo library for player profiles and board games
Game Data: Game names, scores, dates, and statistics
Board Game Information: Names and metadata of board games you track

2.2.title: Automatically Collected Information
list: Device Name: Used only for local multiplayer identification (e.g., "John's iPhone")
App Usage Data: Locally stored preferences and settings

2.3.title: Information We Do NOT Collect
list: We do NOT collect personal identifiers (email, phone number, address)
We do NOT track your location
We do NOT use analytics or tracking services
We do NOT collect data for advertising purposes
We do NOT transmit your data to our servers

3.1.title: Primary Uses
3.1.intro: All data is used exclusively for App functionality:
list: Displaying player profiles and scores
Calculating game statistics and history
Syncing data across your devices via iCloud (if enabled)
Identifying your device during local multiplayer sessions

3.2.title: No Secondary Uses
list: Sell your data to third parties
Use your data for marketing
Share your data with advertisers
Analyze your data for purposes beyond App functionality

4.1.title: Local Storage
4.1.intro: All data is stored locally on your device using:
list: UserDefaults: For app settings and preferences
Local Files: For photos and game data

4.2.title: iCloud Storage (Optional)
list: Data is stored in your personal iCloud account
We do not have access to your iCloud data
Storage is governed by Apple's Privacy Policy
You can disable iCloud sync at any time in Settings

4.3.title: No Remote Servers
4.3.content: We do NOT operate servers that store your data. All data remains on your device or in your personal iCloud account.

5.1.title: Local Multiplayer
list: Your device name is visible to other players on the same local network
Player profiles you select are shared with the host device temporarily during the game session
Game results are transmitted to connected devices at the end of the game
All data is transmitted locally via peer-to-peer connection (no internet required)

5.2.title: Manual Sharing
5.2.content: You can manually share scoreboard images through standard iOS sharing (Messages, Email, etc.). This is entirely your choice and under your control.

5.3.title: Third Parties
5.3.intro: We do NOT share your data with third parties, except:
list: Apple: For iCloud sync (if enabled) and in-app purchases

6.1.title: Protection Measures
list: All local data is protected by your device's security features (passcode, Face ID, Touch ID)
Multiplayer connections use encryption via Apple's MultipeerConnectivity framework
Photos are stored locally and not transmitted except during multiplayer sessions you initiate

6.2.title: Your Responsibility
list: Keep your device secure with a passcode or biometric lock
Backup important data via iCloud sync
Only join multiplayer sessions with trusted players

7.1.title: Retention
7.1.intro: Data is retained indefinitely on your device until you:
list: Delete individual items within the App
Delete the App from your device
Disable iCloud sync and delete iCloud data

7.2.title: Deletion
list: Individual Items: Delete players, games, or game history within the App
All Data: Delete the App from your device
iCloud Data: Disable iCloud sync in Settings, then delete data from iCloud Settings

8.title: Children's Privacy
8.content: The App does not knowingly collect information from children under 13. The App is designed for general audiences and does not contain age-restricted content.

9.1.title: Apple Services
list: iCloud: Optional sync (governed by Apple's Privacy Policy)
StoreKit: In-app purchases (governed by Apple's Privacy Policy)
MultipeerConnectivity: Local multiplayer (no data leaves the local network)
Photo Library & Camera: Accessed only with your explicit permission

10.title: Your Rights
list: Access all your data within the App at any time
Edit or delete any data you've entered
Export data via iCloud backup or manual sharing features
Opt out of iCloud sync at any time
Delete the App and all associated data

11.title: California Privacy Rights
11.intro: If you are a California resident, you have additional rights under CCPA:
list: Right to Know: We've detailed all data collection above
Right to Delete: You can delete all data by removing the App
Right to Opt-Out: We do not sell your personal information
No Discrimination: We do not discriminate based on privacy choices

12.title: International Users
12.content: The App is available worldwide. Your data is stored on your device and in your iCloud account (if enabled), subject to your region's data storage policies.

13.title: Changes to Privacy Policy
13.intro: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes through:
list: App update release notes
In-app notification
Updated "Last Updated" date at the top
13.outro: Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Privacy Policy.

14.title: Contact Us
14.intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or data practices:
list: Email: avdev2024@gmail.com
Response Time: We aim to respond within 7 business days

15.title: Consent
15.content: By using Skora, you consent to this Privacy Policy.
